instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: The history museum
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I want to visit the history museum this weekend because there’s a new exhibition. [1]Would you like to come with me?[/1]||[2]The tickets cost six pounds. Is that too expensive?[/2]||[3]How should we get there?[/3]||[4]Do you want to have lunch in town afterwards?[/4]||Write back soon||Dylan

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Dylan,||Thanks for your message. [1]Yes, I’d like to come with you because I enjoy history and the new exhibition sounds interesting.[/1]||[2]No, six pounds isn’t too expensive because the museum is usually very good and we can spend a long time there.[/2]||[3]We should get there by bus because it stops near the museum and it will be cheaper than taking a taxi.[/3]||[4]I agree that we should have lunch in town afterwards. There’s a nice café near the square.[/4]||We can decide the exact time later.||See you soon,||Noah
